title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
summary: AutoGPT 是一个开源项目，旨在为所有人提供可访问的 AI 工具，让用户能够构建和使用自主 AI 代理。它支持多种大语言模型（如 GPT、Claude、Llama），并基于 Python 开发，拥有超过 18.5 万颗星标，是 AI 代理领域的热门项目。
summary_en: AutoGPT is an open-source project aimed at providing accessible AI tools for everyone to build and use autonomous AI agents. It supports multiple large language models (e.g., GPT, Claude, Llama) and is developed in Python, with over 185k stars, making it a popular project in the AI agent field.
